title: Fix Setup save; tighten SaaS cPanel nav to Home-only pre-subscribe
description:
Setup Save was reloading the page because setup-wizard.js had a syntax error (missing brandingState declaration) so the form submit handler never ran.

SaaS purchaser nav is now staged correctly: Home only until subscription is active, then Home + Setup + Billing. Billing and Setup pages redirect to Home without an active license. Stale localStorage session no longer expands the sidebar to operator menus on Billing.

Who is affected: pipeshare.net cPanel sign-ups. Hard refresh after deploy.
changeLog: Fix setup-wizard.js syntax error breaking Save setup.
Pre-subscribe sidebar: Home only (Buy Subscription stays on Home).
After active subscription: Home, Setup, and Billing only.
Block Billing/Setup URLs without active subscription.
Stop stale session cache from showing operator nav items.
